qa_pairs.question: What information is required from a local Ansys license server administrator to use an existing institutional Ansys license on an Alliance cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: To use a local institutional Ansys license server that already has its network and firewall connections set up for an Alliance cluster, you need to obtain the configured Ansys flex port (FLEXPORT) number (commonly 1055) and the fully qualified hostname (LICSERVER) of the license server from your local Ansys license server administrator.

qa_pairs.question: How do you configure your Ansys license file on an Alliance cluster when using an already-setup local institutional license server?
qa_pairs.answer: If your local institutional Ansys license server is already configured for use on an Alliance cluster, you must first get the Ansys flex port (FLEXPORT) number and the fully qualified hostname (LICSERVER) from your local Ansys license server administrator. Then, you'll configure your `~/.licenses/ansys.lic` file by inserting these FLEXPORT and LICSERVER values into the provided `FILE: ansys.lic` template.
